name: ForumTopicCreated
description: This object represents a service message about a new forum topic created in the chat.

fields.name: icon_color
fields.description: Color of the topic icon in RGB format

fields.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the custom emoji shown as the topic icon

fields.name: is_name_implicit
fields.description: True, if the name of the topic wasn't specified explicitly by its creator and likely needs to be changed by the bot
